## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include console errors if applicable.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 125, Firefox 128]
- **Wallet**: [e.g. Freighter 5.x, Lobstr]
- **Network**: [testnet / mainnet]
- **SDK Version**: [e.g. @sello/sdk 0.1.0]

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant context about the problem.
